REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-29-2019 -*** CASE IS DISMISSED.*** JONATHAN VAKNIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SERGEI BOKOV APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF WITNESS OR DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND DEFENDANT HAS NO OBJECTION. JUDGE: ANDREW CHENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Set For Trial On Jul-29-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Defendant'S Motion; Declaration Of Defendant; [Proposed] Order; [Proposed] Answer
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kari Morris, Esq. 800-637-6922 of the Law Office of Steve Levy for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court informs the party on Court Call they did not inform the Court they were contesting, did not file an Opposition, the Court does not deem anyhting filed and that the party is inconsistent. Plaintiff argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SERGEI BOKOV's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Sergei Bokov's motion to set aside the default and default judgment entered against him on November 7, 2018 is granted. Mr. Bokov must file his answer within five days of the filing of an order granting the motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
